context: Antigravity CLI (agy 1.0.7) bridge for the Jit 14-organ multi-agent system. agy.exe at %LOCALAPPDATA%/agy/bin/agy.exe. VERIFIED flags: -p/--print (non-interactive), --print-timeout (default 5m0s, Go duration format), --model, -c/--continue, --conversation <id>, --dangerously-skip-permissions, --add-dir, --sandbox, -i/--prompt-interactive, --log-file. Subcommands: models, plugin, update, changelog, install. NO --output-format json flag — stdout is plain text. Auth shares Google account (Google AI Pro: 1500 req/day shared quota).

groups.mission: Antigravity (agy) bridge: Node wrapper, bash limb, Claude Code skill, fusion patterns doc

members.task: Output ONLY raw JavaScript (no markdown fences, no commentary, start with #!/usr/bin/env node then a /** comment). Write scripts/agy-bridge.js — a zero-dependency Node.js (v20+) CommonJS wrapper around Google Antigravity CLI for Windows. Requirements: (1) locate agy.exe: env AGY_BIN, else process.env.LOCALAPPDATA + agy inagy.exe, else plain agy (PATH); verify existence with fs.existsSync where path is absolute. (2) parse argv: --prompt <text> (required unless --models or --continue-id given), --model <id> (optional), --timeout <go-duration, default 10m0s>, --cwd <dir> (spawn cwd, default process.cwd()), --skip-permissions (adds --dangerously-skip-permissions), --add-dir <dir> (repeatable), --continue-id <conversationId> (adds --conversation <id>), --models (runs agy models subcommand), --json (wrap result in JSON envelope). (3) build agy args: for prompt mode: [-p, prompt, --print-timeout, timeout] plus optional [--model, m]. (4) spawn with child_process.spawn, windowsHide true, capture stdout+stderr as utf8, enforce a JS-side hard kill at parsed timeout + 30s grace (parse Go duration like 10m0s, 90s, 1h2m into ms; helper function). (5) on completion print: if --json, single-line JSON {ok: exitCode===0, exitCode, model: model||null, durationMs, stdout, stderr: stderr.slice(0,2000)}; else raw stdout passthrough and stderr to process.stderr. (6) exit with the child exit code (124 on JS-side timeout kill). (7) NO external deps, strict mode, clear --help text listing all options. Keep under 180 lines.

Output ONLY raw bash script content (no markdown fences), starting with #!/usr/bin/env bash. Write limbs/antigravity.sh for a Thai multi-agent system (มนุษย์ Agent, organ naming convention). Header comment in Thai+English following this style: a Buddhist-principle line, then Usage block. Subcommands: ask "prompt" [model] — one-shot via node "$JIT_ROOT/scripts/agy-bridge.js" --prompt ... --json; think "prompt" — same but prepends a short Thai system-style instruction asking for structured reasoning; code "task" [dir] — runs bridge with --skip-permissions --cwd dir for code-editing tasks (echo a warning first in Thai that auto-approve is on); models — list models via bridge --models; status — check agy binary exists and print version (call agy.exe --version directly). Resolve SCRIPT_DIR and JIT_ROOT like: SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"; JIT_ROOT="${SCRIPT_DIR}/..". Source "$SCRIPT_DIR/lib.sh" if it exists (guard with [ -f ]). AGY_BIN default: "$LOCALAPPDATA/agy/bin/agy.exe" with fallback to plain agy. Use case statement, default branch prints usage. Keep under 120 lines, POSIX-friendly bash, double-quote all expansions.

Output ONLY raw markdown file content (no surrounding fences, no commentary). Write SKILL.md for a Claude Code skill named antigravity. Frontmatter: --- then name: antigravity, description: (one paragraph: Dispatch tasks to Google Antigravity CLI (agy) — Gemini 3 models via Google AI Pro. Use when user says antigravity, agy, gemini, ask google, second opinion from gemini, or wants long-context/multimodal analysis or parallel heavy execution outside Claude. Do NOT trigger for CommandCode tasks (use cc-team) or Ollama Thai tasks (use limbs/ollama.sh).), then --- . Body sections: (1) Quick reference table of invocations: node scripts/agy-bridge.js --prompt "..." --json | --model gemini-3-flash | --skip-permissions --cwd <repo> | --models. Also bash limbs/antigravity.sh ask|think|code|models|status. (2) Model selection guidance: gemini-3-flash for fast/cheap, gemini-3-pro / gemini-3.1-pro for deep reasoning, note quota 1500 req/day shared Google AI Pro pool — prefer flash by default. (3) Patterns section with 4 named patterns: Second Opinion (verify Claude claim via agy one-shot), Long-Context Reader (dump big file/diff via stdin or --add-dir, ask for summary), Parallel Specialist (agy works in separate git worktree with --skip-permissions while Claude orchestrates), CC-Fusion (CommandCode generates code cheaply, agy reviews with fresh eyes, Claude arbitrates disagreements). Each pattern: when-to-use one-liner + exact command. (4) Safety rules: never --skip-permissions outside an isolated worktree; quota burn warning (background chatter counts against daily quota); first run requires browser auth by human (suggest typing: ! agy auth in terminal). Windows-safe paths (no /tmp). Keep total under 110 lines.

Output ONLY raw markdown content (no fences around the whole doc, no commentary). Write docs/antigravity-cc-fusion.md — Thai-language (technical terms in English) playbook ผนวกกำลัง Google Antigravity (agy CLI, Gemini 3, quota 1500 req/day Google AI Pro) กับ CommandCode provider (มี quota เหลือ, models: deepseek-v4-pro, Qwen3.7-Max, GLM-5.1, Kimi-K2.6, claude-sonnet-4-6 ฯลฯ) ในระบบ มนุษย์ Agent ที่มี Claude Code (Fable 5) เป็น orchestrator. Sections: (1) หลักการแบ่งงาน 3 ชั้น — ตารางเปรียบเทียบ: CommandCode = bulk codegen/text-gen ราคาคุ้มสุด embed context ได้, Antigravity/Gemini = long-context (1M), multimodal, agentic execution พร้อม tool use ใน sandbox, Claude Fable = orchestration + SA review + ตัดสินใจ. (2) Fusion Patterns 5 แบบ พร้อม ascii data-flow diagram สั้นๆ ต่อแบบ: Generate-Review-Arbitrate (CC สร้าง → agy review → Claude ตัดสิน), Long-Context Scout (agy อ่าน codebase ใหญ่ สรุป contract → CC สร้างโค้ดตาม contract → Claude apply+gate), Parallel Burst (CC 4 tasks ขนาน + agy 1 heavy task ขนาน → Claude รวม), Cross-Examination (คำตอบสำคัญให้ทั้ง CC model และ agy ตอบอิสระ → เทียบ → ถ้าต่างให้ Claude สอบสวน), Quota Ladder (เริ่ม CC ก่อนเสมอ → agy flash เมื่อต้อง tool-use/long-context → agy pro เมื่อ flash ไม่พอ → Fable 5 เป็น last resort). (3) ตาราง cost/quota discipline: provider, เพดาน, งานที่เหมาะ, งานที่ห้าม. (4) Failure handling: agy timeout/auth fail → fallback CC; CC fence-marker corruption → tsc gate ก่อน commit เสมอ (บทเรียน MEGA-100). Under 150 lines.
